contents.question: The power is being supplied but the device does not operate.
answer: If the terminal and the bracket are far away from each other, the device may not operate due to the temper switch.
Check the adaptor or the power cable.

contents.question: No video is being recorded, or the image doesn't appear.
answer: If you're using a power adapter, make sure its output equals or exceeds the camera's maximum power consumption.
Do not connect a power adapter and PoE+ at the same time. Doing so may cause the device to malfunction.
If powered via an Ethernet cable, be sure it is connected using PoE+ or PoE++, not standard PoE.
Check that the network cable is securely connected and that the Ethernet waterproof rubber seal is properly fastened.

contents.question: I lost my PIN.
answer: For a normal user PIN, request it from the administrator and enter it again.
If you have lost the Admin PIN, contact the installation company.

contents.question: I entered my PIN and pressed the OK button, but I still cannot open the door.
answer: Check if you have entered the registered PIN correctly.
Check if you have changed the PIN recently.
If you cannot remember the PIN, request it from the administrator and enter it again.

contents.question: It fails to scan a QR/Barcode.
answer: Refer to Correct QR/Barcode Authentication Method and try again.
XS2-QDPB, XS2-QAPB: Place the guide beam at the center of the QR code.
XS2-DPB, XS2-APB, XS2-ODPB, XS2-OAPB: Position the QR/Barcode in the center of the scan screen of the device.
Adjust the brightness of your smartphone so that the device can read the QR/Barcode clearly and try again.
If the problem persists, contact the administrator who issued the QR/Barcode.

contents.question: It fails to scan a QR/Barcode.
answer: Refer to Correct QR/Barcode Authentication Method and try again.
Adjust the brightness of your smartphone so that the device can read the QR/Barcode clearly and try again.
If the problem persists, contact the administrator who issued the QR/Barcode.

contents.question: The face has been registered but face authentication cannot be done smoothly, and errors occur frequently.
answer: Check Cautions for enrolling a face and enroll the face again.
If there are many enrolled faces, change Matching Timeout and try again.

contents.question: Face authentication has suddenly stopped working.
answer: Check Cautions for authenticating a face and try again.

contents.question: Mask Detection is set to Enabled, but face authentication cannot be done smoothly when wearing a mask.
answer: Authenticate your face twice with the mask pull down on the tip of your nose. Then, authenticate your face again wearing a mask that covers your nose completely. If the problem persists, contact the installation company.

contents.question: The thermal camera fails to measure temperature.
answer: Check if the thermal camera is properly connected to the terminal.
Measure the temperature again without covering your forehead. If the problem persists, contact the installation company.

contents.question: The thermal camera measures lower temperature than actual temperature.
answer: If a user measures the temperature after being exposed to cold temperatures for a long time, the temperature may be measured lower than the actual temperature. Wait for 1 to 2 minutes indoors and try again. If the problem persists, contact the installation company.

contents.question: The fingerprint has been enrolled but fingerprint authentication cannot be done smoothly and errors occur frequently.
answer: Check Correct fingerprint input method and enroll the fingerprint again.
If your fingerprint has a cut, the device may recognize your fingerprint as someone else's fingerprint.
If there are many enrolled fingerprints, change Matching Timeout and try again.
The authentication rate may vary for each fingerprint due to different characteristics. Enroll the fingerprint of another finger.

contents.question: Suddenly fingerprint authentication cannot be done.
answer: Check if the finger or the fingerprint sensor is smeared with sweat, water or dust, and wipe the finger or the fingerprint sensor clean.
Wipe your finger and the fingerprint sensor with a dry towel and then try again.
If the fingerprint of your finger is too dry, blow on the fingerprint and then try again.

contents.question: The fingerprint sensor does not turn on.
answer: When Sensor Mode is set to Auto On, the sensor will only turn on when you place finger on the fingerprint sensor. If you want the fingerprint sensor to always be on, set Sensor Mode to Always On.

contents.question: The door cannot be locked when I close the door.
answer: The electric lock may be malfunctioning. Have an inspection through the installation company.

contents.question: Suddenly the time has become incorrect.
answer: The device is equipped with a built-in battery but if power is not supplied for a long time, the built-in battery may die, causing the time to become incorrect. You can correct the time by referring to Date & Time.

contents.question: I lost my Admin PIN, so I cannot access the Admin mode.
answer: The administrator grants an access permission in the device, so only the administrator can access the Admin menu.
If you have lost the Admin PIN, contact the installation company.

contents.question: After upgrading the firmware on existing devices, the Master Admin setting does not appear.
answer: Devices upgraded with firmware from existing devices do not support master administrator configuration. You can enhance device security by strengthening the permissions of all administrators through the Admin 2-Step Authentication option. For more detailed information, refer to Admin 2-step Authentication.

contents.question: The image appears tilted after installing the camera.
answer: When mounted on a wall, make sure the red triangle on the mount plate points to 12 o'clock (north).

Rotate the camera body left or right to adjust the installation angle. The maximum adjustment is 8° to each side (15° total). If you need more adjustment, change the mounting plate hole positions and reinstall.

contents.question: When Windows 10 users access the web server using Chrome or Firefox, the microphone volume may fluctuate periodically.
answer: This happens when the microphone driver is set to Realtek. Change the microphone driver to "High Definition Audio Device" (the Windows default) or install a third-party driver.

contents.question: What are the required WAVE file specifications for audio playback during events?
answer: It is recommended to use a sampling rate (sampling rate) of 48000 KHz or lower.
Use 8-bit or 16-bit samples (bits per sample).
Only PCM-encoded formats are supported.

contents.question: I can't see the video.
answer: If video transmission is set to multicast, ensure the router on the camera's local network supports multicast.

contents.question: A video analytics event occurred but no alarm was generated.
answer: Ensure the alarm output port is set correctly.

contents.question: Cannot access the camera from the browser.
answer: Ensure the camera's network settings are correct.
Ensure the network cable is connected properly.
If connected via DHCP, ensure the camera obtained a dynamic IP address.
If the camera is connected to a router, ensure port forwarding is configured correctly.

contents.question: The connection to the web server that was monitoring the video was lost.
answer: If another user changes camera or network settings, the connected web server disconnects.
Ensure the network connection is working.

contents.question: Cameras connected to the network are not being discovered.
answer: Device communication may be blocked by firewall or network security settings. Ensure the ports (TCP, UDP) required for device discovery and communication are allowed on the network.

contents.question: Recording is not being saved to the Micro SD card.
answer: Check whether the Micro SD card is faulty.
Always power off the device before replacing the Micro SD card.

contents.question: The Micro SD card is inserted but not recognized.
answer: Ensure the Micro SD card is inserted in the correct orientation. Micro SD cards formatted by other devices cannot be guaranteed to work with this camera.

Ensure the card capacity (recommended 16GB–1TB) and manufacturer (Samsung, SanDisk, Transcend) meet the recommended specifications. Use High Endurance or Pro Endurance product lines for continuous write operations. Cards from other manufacturers or product lines may vary in compatibility.

contents.question: Moisture or condensation forms inside the camera.
answer: After assembling the cover, ensure the 3 retaining screws are fully tightened. Failure to fully tighten the screws may compromise waterproof/dustproof (IP66/IP67) performance.

When wiring the Ethernet and other cables, ensure the supplied waterproof rubber, joints, and nuts for the Ethernet cable are fully and securely fastened with no gaps. Insert waterproof rubber hole plugs fully into any unused holes.

contents.question: AI face and object recognition performance has noticeably declined.
answer: Ensure the lens is not exposed to direct sunlight or installed in an area with strong backlight. Lens flare or backlighting is a primary cause of reduced AI detection accuracy.
